2017, Nevada Division State Lands provided funding Tahoe Resource Conservation District's contracted divers survey Nevada shoreline Stateline Zephyr Point aquatic invasive plants Eurasian watermilfoil (Myriophyllum spicatum) curly-leaf pondweed (Potamogeton crispus).
divers found Eurasian watermilfoil occupying shoreline north south Marina.
These detections demonstrated control strategy Point Marina eliminate source invasive plants Shore.
training homeowners discussed management practices deter growth plants Marina project reached completion.
These practices include daily skimming Marina detected plant fragments, annual survey conducted marina staff, annual diver surveys.
